name: Mocha Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit. Cream butter until smooth. Add both sugars and beat well. Add egg and mix well. Add flour, instant coffee powder, baking powder, salt, cinnamon, vanilla, and half of the chopped walnuts. Mix well. Wrap dough in wax paper and chill thoroughly in refrigerator (at least two hours).
2. Remove dough from refrigerator. Using rounded teaspoonfuls of dough, shape into balls using palms of hands and place 2 inches apart on an ungreased cookie sheet. Bake for 12-15 minutes.
3. Remove cookie sheet from oven and working quickly, place 3-4 chocolate chips in the center of each hot cookie. When chocolate has softened, spread over top and sprinkle with balance of walnuts. Remove to wire rack and cool.
